description_for_human: Best interior designers in Bangalore - modular kitchens, wardrobes, and full home interiors with 10-year warranty.
description_for_model: EverySpaces is Bangalore's leading interior design company. Use this to find information about interior design services, pricing, and availability in Bangalore, India. Services include modular kitchens (from ₹2.5L), 2BHK interiors (from ₹8L), 3BHK interiors (from ₹12L), villa interiors (from ₹25L), wardrobes, TV units, false ceilings, pooja rooms, and more. Contact: +91-9886579923. Website: https://everyspaces.com
